scripts.dev: npm run quality:fix && npm run dev:up
scripts.dev:build: npm run quality:fix && npm run dev:up:build
scripts.lint: npm --prefix backend run lint && npm --prefix frontend run lint
scripts.lint:fix: npm --prefix backend run lint:fix && npm --prefix frontend run lint:fix
scripts.format: npm --prefix backend run format && npm --prefix frontend run format
scripts.format:check: npm --prefix backend run format:check && npm --prefix frontend run format:check
scripts.quality: npm run lint && npm run format:check
scripts.quality:fix: npm run lint:fix && npm run format
